mnemonics: CCS Marinescu: My Very Efficient Cloud Uses Real Security (MVECURS) - Model, Virtualization, Elasticity, Cloud Models (IaaS/PaaS/SaaS), Utility, Reliability, Security
keyPoints: Cloud computing is a model for enabling ubiquitous, convenient, on-demand network access to a shared pool of configurable computing resources.
Essential characteristics include on-demand self-service, broad network access, resource pooling, rapid elasticity, and measured service.
Security is a paramount concern, involving data confidentiality, integrity, and availability, often addressed through encryption and trusted computing.
commonMistakes: Assuming cloud security is solely the provider's responsibility (shared responsibility model).
Overlooking the importance of data location and jurisdiction for compliance with regulations.
